title: Anayansi
altText: People working together at a desk
description1: Create and Cracker Hashes written in python.
description2: This tool written in python will allow you to create hashes or break them using a dictionary of words such as rockyou.txt. Just pass the path where you will have your worldlist for MD5, SHA1, SHA256, SHA384, SHA512.
